name: Nene (FNF) (Pico's School)
description:
"Protect me? Protect yourself!"

This is Nene, say hi to Nene, she's saying hi to you hiii :P if you're seeing this then the Darnell bot probably failed and I need to make up for it.

I was planning on making nene, but i was a lazy bum and never made the effort to write her. And no, she wasn't planned as a plan b for the darnell bot, but uhh, it flopped so hard i had to compensate for it. She's the nene from fnf, not pico's school btw.

Fixed the typo in the intro, uhh sorry

"Ok, I don't have anything to ask, but will you make other male bots?" Only if I feel like it or get requested. They don't do very well here.

"Sauce plsplspls" Sorry I didn't find the artist, found this one on pinterest tho.

"You're bummed about the Darnell bot?" Not really, it was just a experiment, so it was just to test out the waters.

Follow me and stuff, check my other shit out if you want to.
creator: sillygoober.com
